analysis.consistency: The feature description is consistent with established D&D 5e mechanics for the Barbarian class and the 'Relentless Rage' feature.
analysis.quality: The feature text is high quality, clearly defining the trigger (dropping to 0 HP while raging and not dying outright), the mechanic (DC 10 Constitution saving throw), the effect (drop to 1 HP instead), and the scaling/reset condition (DC increases by 5 per subsequent use, resets on short/long rest).

mechanics.trigger: Dropping to 0 Hit Points while Raging (and not dying outright).
mechanics.core_effect: Make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw; success means dropping to 1 HP instead of 0.

scaling.mechanism: DC increases by 5 for each subsequent use.

analysis.concerns: None. The feature is well-defined and mechanically sound for its intended purpose (enhancing survivability during rage).
